prestazioni: Engine swap to a Hyundai D4CB 2.9L CRDi turbo-diesel (engine code: D4CB) with a BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe, and a PPE (Precision Power Engineering) high-flow intercooler for reduced intake temps and optimized boost response up to 2.2 bar (32 psi).

Full custom ECU remap via a KESS V3 tool with a D4CB-specific Stage 3 tune by Viezu Technologies, targeting 220 HP and 480 Nm of torque with a 4,500 RPM redline, paired with a Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel and uprated clutch kit (Part No. 624 0001 00).

Upgraded drivetrain with a Quaife ATB helical LSD differential (Part No. QDF7J) for the Porter Hi’s 5-speed manual transmission, reinforced half-shafts from GKN Driveline (Part No. 37410-42A00), and a custom 3.73:1 final drive ratio for improved acceleration in the 0-100 km/h range.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny-inspired widebody kit (Porter Hi-specific, not a rebadge) with carbon fiber fender flares, custom front splitter, and a rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon, reducing drag coefficient by 8% while accommodating 18x9.5-inch Volk Racing TE37SL wheels with 245/40R18 Toyo R888R tires.

Custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (Part No. CC-HYUNDAI-PORTER-HI) with bolt-in design, integrated with a Sparco Pro2000 racing seat (Part No. 39509SPG) and a Schroth Profi II 6-point harness (Part No. 41400.95) for track-day compliance.

Full OEM+ restomod with a custom matte military green wrap (3M 1080 M227), Hella Rallye 3000 Super White headlights with custom CREE LED projectors, and a custom rear bed delete with a carbon fiber tonneau cover by VIS Racing (Part No. VR-HYU-PORTER-BED).
